storyboard.content: I have been getting more and more dandruff over the past 2 months and it is quite noticeable.
It started about 2 months ago and has been gradually getting worse.
My scalp is very itchy and covered in flakes.
The itching is sometimes bad enough to be distracting, but it hasn't stopped me from doing daily activities.
I have tried several dandruff shampoos but they only help for a short time before it comes back.
I am a 27-year-old man with no other health conditions or medications.
The dandruff is visible on my clothes and has become a social concern for me.
